name: App Store翻译
description: Translate App Store release notes and app descriptions into Chinese. Supports iOS System Translation (iOS 18+) and Scripting AI Assistant (streaming). Open via Share Sheet / Shortcuts with an App Store URL. Maintained by IamNewHands.

localizedDescriptions.en: Translate App Store release notes and app descriptions into Chinese. Supports iOS System Translation (iOS 18+) and Scripting AI Assistant (streaming). Open via Share Sheet / Shortcuts with an App Store URL. Maintained by IamNewHands.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 将 App Store 更新说明与应用描述翻译为中文。支持 iOS 系统翻译（iOS 18+）与 Scripting AI 助手（流式输出）。通过分享菜单 / 快捷指令传入 App Store 链接即可使用。维护：IamNewHands。
